data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for support of subject entities beyond built-in domain tables.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement to support subject entities beyond built-in domain tables. However, the evidence provided does not include any direct checks or validations related to this requirement. While there are multiple successful steps related to bookings and member actions, none of them explicitly demonstrate the existence or validation of support for subject entities, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence of support for subject entities beyond built-in domain tables.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify support for subject entities beyond built-in domain tables.
